token.title: Grab Food — Access Token
token.description:
Paste your Grab access token. You can get it two ways:

**Browser (Chrome/Firefox):** Open food.grab.com → log in → F12 → Application → Local Storage → `https://food.grab.com` → copy `access_token`.

**Android (HTTPCanary / Charles):** Open the Grab app → intercept any request → copy the value after `Authorization: Bearer ` in the request headers.

The token starts with `eyJ`.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Grab servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_token: Token rejected by Grab. Copy the full value starting with eyJ with no extra spaces.

abort.already_configured: This Grab account is already configured.
